Description: D4Sign digital signature integration for Umbraco. Supports document upload, signer management, webhook processing, and a Lit 3 backoffice dashboard. Supports Umbraco 13 (net8.0) and Umbraco 17 (net10.0).

AuthorDetails.Name: SplatDev
AuthorDetails.Description: SplatDev Ltda — building Umbraco plugins and tools for agencies and developers.
